nasb.text: Now when the Philistines were at war again with Israel, David went down and his servants with him; and as they fought against the Philistines, David became weary.

esv.text: There was war again between the Philistines and Israel, and David went down together with his servants, and they fought against the Philistines. And David grew weary.

cnv.text: 非利士人與以色列人又有了戰事。大衛和跟隨他的臣僕一同下去，要與非利士人爭戰；大衛疲倦了。

ccb.text: 以色列人又和非利士人交战，大卫亲自出征。在他十分疲倦的时候，
